description_long: This object is a smooth, uniformly colored brown egg with a slightly glossy finish. Its surface is free of any visible markings, patterns, or textural variations, giving it a clean and natural appearance. The egg has a classic ovoid shape, with a broader base tapering gently to a more rounded top. The coloration is consistent throughout, resembling the typical hue of a farm-fresh brown chicken egg. The shell appears hard and unbroken, suggesting it is intact and uncracked. The overall impression is of a fresh, unadorned egg suitable for culinary or decorative use.
description: A smooth, solid brown egg with a hard, glossy shell and no visible markings. Its ovoid shape and uniform color evoke a fresh, natural appearance.
description_view_0: The egg appears as a symmetrical, smooth brown oval with a subtle highlight at the center.
description_view_1: This view shows the same smooth brown surface, with the highlight slightly shifted, maintaining the uniform appearance.
description_view_2: The egg remains visually consistent, with no new features or markings visible from this angle.
description_view_3: The surface and color are unchanged, showing the same even brown tone and smooth texture.
attribute_orientation: upright with the broader end at the bottom
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a breakfast setting or during food preparation in a kitchen.
